name: EvenUp
description: AI platform for personal injury law firms that drafts demand letters and calculates case damages.

seo.title: EvenUp — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: EvenUp: AI platform for personal injury law firms that drafts demand letters and calculates case damages.

when_to_use: Generating demand letters and case summaries for personal injury law
Automating medical record review and damages calculation
Accelerating case preparation workflows for plaintiff law firms
Building AI-assisted legal document review for litigation teams

pros: Drafts demand letters specifically for PI law
Targeted at a clear, high-value workflow
review.verdict: A vertical AI win for PI firms; irrelevant outside that narrow practice area.
review.best_for: US personal injury law firms drafting demand letters at volume
review.not_for: General legal tech or law firms outside personal injury

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
